Bluetooth firmware source files, functions, scripts, stub operations, and build configuration.

## Folders
- **[nimble](nimble/README.md)**: Bluetooth firmware source files for advertising, connection management, analytics, GATT operations, and pairing.
- **[qemu](qemu/README.md)**: Bluetooth firmware functions and scripts for advertising, analytics, bonding, communication, GATT, HRM, identity, logging, pairing, reconnection, responsiveness, and transport in a QEMU environment.
- **[stub](stub/README.md)**: Stub functions and control operations for Bluetooth advertising, analytics, bonding, communication, GATT, HRM, identity, initialization, logging, pairing, reconnection, and scanning in Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Configures and builds Bluetooth firmware based on the specified Bluetooth controller.
